description:

_________________________________________

I WAS LISTENING TO “CORAZÓN SIN CARA” BY PRINCE ROYCE (I’m Mexican, shout out to all my Spanish ppl 🙏🏼🙏🏼🙏🏼). WITH THE HELP OF MY HUSBAND, WE CHOSE SANJI TO REPRESENT THIS SONG—IT’S TOO PERFECT 😭😭😭🙏🏼🙏🏼🙏🏼_________________________________________

you’ve been skipping meals recently... a little too much for Sanji’s liking. So, being the good boyfriend he is, he goes to check on you.
